name: Ohad Talmor
description: American/Swiss jazz saxophonist, clarinetist, composer, conductor and arranger
abstract: Ohad Talmor (born 1970) is an American/Swiss jazz saxophonist, clarinetist, composer, conductor and arranger.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Lee Konitz 80th Birthday Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Konitz Lee
about_quotes.evidence: He invited me to send my lines that I was currently writing everyday, just as little exercises, and he orchestrated them
